rationale: The citing paper references Kim, Lee, and Gupta (2020) only in a literature-summary sentence as one prior estimate of soda-tax sales effects (the Washington case). It is grouped with several other studies to document mixed magnitudes across locations, without a distinct conceptual or methodological role for this specific paper. The citing study does not build on the Bayesian synthetic control framework from Kim et al.; its core analyses use DID, robustness checks with synthetic DID, and separate methodological citations for those choices.
